description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on published releases, a scheduled cron job, and workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: update-autorevision and update-archive. The update-autorevision job runs on ubuntu-22.04, checks out the repository, updates AutoRevision.txt with git revision information, finds the target branch, and creates a pull request. The update-archive job runs on ubuntu-22.04, checks out the repository, updates AutoRevision.txt, creates a tar.gz and zip archive of the repository, and uploads the archives as a release asset.
